message:
test(event-loop,providers): Add fixture-driven event loop conformance suite and provider factory tests

Event loop conformance tests (tests/event_loop_conformance.rs):

- Introduce JSON-fixture-driven test harness for PiJS event loop scheduler
  verification, enabling declarative specification of timer/event ordering
  invariants without modifying test code

- Test coverage for core scheduling guarantees:
  - Hostcall completions take priority over due timers (hostcall_before_due_timer)
  - Timer ordering by deadline then schedule sequence (timers_order_by_deadline_then_schedule_seq)
  - clear_timeout prevents timer execution (clear_timeout_prevents_fire)
  - Inbound events maintain FIFO ordering (inbound_events_fifo)
  - Microtask queue drains to fixpoint before next macrotask (microtasks_drain_to_fixpoint)

- Fixture format (version 1.0) supports ops: set_timeout, clear_timeout,
  enqueue_hostcall_completion, enqueue_inbound_event, set_clock, advance_clock,
  tick with optional microtask count and expected task assertion

Provider factory tests (tests/provider_factory.rs):

- Add unit tests for normalize_openai_base() URL normalization covering:
  - Bare domain → appends /chat/completions
  - /v1 suffix → appends /chat/completions
  - Already complete URLs → preserved unchanged
  - /v1/responses endpoint → preserved for responses API

- Add create_provider() integration tests verifying correct provider
  instantiation for anthropic, openai, and openrouter backends with
  appropriate api type detection and model ID passthrough

- Uses TestHarness for structured logging of test progress

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
